partner_types.label: Stable cooperator
partner_types.description: Returns are noisy but stable around 0.40 across all stakes.

partner_types.label: Predictable opportunist
partner_types.description: Low stakes are returned generously and high stakes are under-returned; average return is held near 0.40.

partner_types.label: Random opportunist
partner_types.description: Uses the same return values as the predictable opportunist, but low returns are not tied to stake size.

control_conditions.label: Controllable stake
control_conditions.description: The model can choose whether the next round is low, medium, or high stake.

control_conditions.label: Fixed high stake
control_conditions.description: The next round is definitely high stake.

control_conditions.label: Random stake
control_conditions.description: The next round stake is uniformly randomly selected from low, medium, and high after access is paid.
